name: Rollback Recovery Suite
description: Tasks for preserving user work, checkpoint rollback, retry isolation, and dirty worktree recovery.

cases.title: Preserve unrelated user dirty file
cases.prompt: Implement a backend change while an unrelated user-edited file is dirty.
setup: Modify an unrelated file before the run starts.
expected: Agent changes are limited to task files
Final report separates user changes from agent changes

evidence: Status still shows the pre-existing user file.
successCriteria: No unrelated dirty file is modified by the agent.

cases.title: Restore from checkpoint after failed edit
cases.prompt: Make a file edit, fail verification, then restore the file from the run checkpoint and record the rollback.
setup: Use a temporary file tracked by run_file_checkpoints.
expected: Checkpoint before and after hashes exist
forbidden: Restoring from current git state only

successCriteria: Rollback is based on captured snapshot.

cases.title: Retry creates isolated run timeline
cases.prompt: Retry a failed run and prove the old timeline remains intact while new events attach to the retry run.
setup: Force a deterministic failed tool result.

evidence: Timeline query for each run returns only its own events.
successCriteria: Run history is immutable across retry.

cases.title: Detect file changed after checkpoint
cases.prompt: Attempt to apply a rollback when the target file has been modified by the user after the checkpoint.
setup: Create checkpoint, then modify the file outside the agent run.
expected: User change is not overwritten silently
Final status is blocked or needs user decision
forbidden: Silent overwrite of newer user content

evidence: Conflict reason includes current hash mismatch.

cases.title: Report partial command failure honestly
cases.prompt: Run a multi-step command where the final step fails and verify the report does not hide partial failure.
setup: Use a deterministic command that exits non-zero after producing stdout.
expected: stdout and stderr tails are preserved
